name: Colvin Outdoor Tennis Courts
description: Colvin Outdoor Tennis Courts is a place to play pickleball in Stillwater, OK. There are 8 outdoor concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Amenities include lights. The courts are free.

name: Greenwood Tennis Center
description: Come play pickleball at Greenwood Tennis Center in Stillwater, OK! There are 2 indoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Amenities include restrooms. A membership is required to play.

name: Stillwater Armory
description: Stillwater Armory is a place to play pickleball in Stillwater, OK. There are 3 indoor concrete and hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts are free. Amenities include restrooms.

name: Stillwater Country Club
description: Come play pickleball at Stillwater Country Club in Stillwater, OK! There are 4 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. A membership is required to play. Amenities include lights.

name: Stillwater Indoor Pickleball Club
description: Stillwater Indoor Pickleball Club is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Stillwater, OK. There are 5 indoor concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts can be reserved. Players have access to restrooms and water. A one-time fee is required to play.

name: Total Health Fitness
description: Total Health Fitness is a place to play pickleball in Stillwater, OK. There is 1 indoor court. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Amenities include restrooms. A one-time fee is required to play.
